summary: First iteration — Plans (Planos) + Stamps feature end-to-end testing. Backend: 11/11 pytest cases passed covering stamps (list/create/delete/builtin rejection/non-admin 403) and plans (create/list/get/patch/delete/auth). Frontend: Full flow verified from login → materiales header icon (map-outline) → /planos list → create plan modal → editor toolbar → stamp picker → back to list. All required testIDs resolved correctly and the plan created in the UI appears in the list with correct metadata.
action_items: Export to JPG/PDF was NOT exercised — it relies on react-native-view-shot / expo-print which behave differently on Web. Manual verification on a real device (Expo Go) recommended before release.
Stamp upload in the admin 'Sellos' manager uses web FileReader; on native it shows an Alert saying to use web — consider wiring expo-image-picker in a future iteration.

Drawing (PanResponder) on canvas and autosave after draw were not automated (Playwright touch simulation on SVG not reliable). Backend PATCH /api/plans was verified to persist shapes; manual drawing smoke-test recommended.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py list_plans issues 2 concurrent find() scans (one with projection excluding data, another pulling all data to count shapes). Combine into one query with a projection {id:1,title:1,data:1,...} and compute len(data.shapes) in Python — saves a full-collection scan.

Frontend editor file /app/frontend/app/planos/[id].tsx is ~860 lines — consider splitting StampPicker, StampManager, renderShape/hitTest/scaleShape helpers into separate files for maintainability (>700 LOC guideline).
BUILTIN_STAMPS ids on backend use 'builtin_door_handle' but icon_key is 'door_handle' — consistent. OK.
api.ts uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL correctly (no hardcoding). Good.
seed_data_creation: Test plans/stamps are created with 'TEST_' prefix and cleaned up within pytest fixtures. One UI-created plan (TEST_UI_<ts>) was left in DB — safe to delete manually if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth: admin@materiales.com / Admin1234 (seeded on startup). A plan named 'Oficina prueba' already exists in the DB from earlier manual testing. Backend env var for tests is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Backend auto-seeds admin user on startup. Drawing + Export (JPG/PDF) flows are not covered by automation — they need on-device manual QA.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found in this iteration.
